OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF?S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 75988810) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE W.W. HENRY COMPANY, L.P.
REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF (TRANSACTION ID # 76013036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEISINGER, JOHN
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-15-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 304

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION IN DEPARTMENT 304, PLAINTIFF JOHN MEISINGER'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED UNDER CCP 36(A). OPPOSITION FILED BY DEFENDANTS PACIFIC FLOORING SUPPLY, INC., AND THE W.W HENRY COMPANY, L.P. REPLY FILED. 1. THE TRIAL DATE IS AUGUST 4, 2025, AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 206. LAST DAY PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(F) IS AUGUST 13, 2025. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS JULY 29, 2025. A FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR JUNE 17, 2025, AT 4:00 P.M. A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR THURSDAY, JULY 31, 2025, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 503. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY, NOT REPORTED. (304)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUT-OFF

ASBESTOS MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-31-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 503 PER ORDER FILED ON APR-15-2025. PERSONAL APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED BY ALL UNLESS A PARTY IS EXCUSED FOR GOOD CAUSE. A REQUEST TO EXCUSE A PERSONAL APPEARANCE MUST BE SUBMITTED TO DEPARTMENT503@SFTC.ORG TWO WEEKS BEFORE THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. (304)
ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR - NOT HELD AND SETTLED. EMAIL CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM COUNSEL THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED. (503)

PLAINTIFF JOHN MEISINGER NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF (TENTATIVE RULING PURPOSES ONLY)
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 15, 2025 in Department 304, Line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN MEISINGER's Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff is GRANTED under CCP 36(a). Opposition filed by Defendants Pacific Flooring Supply, Inc., and the W.W Henry Company, L.P. Reply filed. 1. The trial date is August 4, 2025, at 11:15 a.m. in Department 206. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is August 13, 2025. The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is July 29, 2025. A further case management conference is set for June 17, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. A mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, July 31, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is excused for good cause. A request to excuse a personal appearance must be submitted to Department503@sftc.org two weeks before the mandatory settlement conference. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Johnny Sengmany, Not Reported. (304)
